image.alt: Painted portrait of a Central Asian ruler seated in formal robes

rounds.revealFact: Genghis Khan founded the Mongol Empire, which became the largest contiguous land empire in history.

clues: A small force held a narrow coastal pass against a much larger invading army.

pairs.b: The city of Rome is traditionally founded

Construction begins on the Great Wall of China
The Han Dynasty is founded in China
pairs.b: The Silk Road trade routes open between East and West

rounds.prompt: Revolutionaries storm the Bastille prison in Paris.
rounds.revealFact: The storming of the Bastille became a symbol of the French Revolution and is still celebrated as Bastille Day.

image.alt: Extreme close-up of weathered tan limestone with subtle carved detail

rounds.revealFact: Carved from limestone bedrock, the Great Sphinx is one of the largest and oldest monumental statues in the world.
